class.name: SQLiteAccess
class.description: A wrapper class that lets you perform SQL statements on an SQLite database file.

method.name: backup
method.description: Creates a backup of the database at the location specified by [param path]. Returns [code]true[/code] if the operation succeeds.

method.name: backup_async
method.description: Creates an asynchronous backup of the database to [param path]. Returns a [SQLiteBackup] object used to monitor and control the operation.

method.name: close
method.description: Closes the database connection and releases all associated resources. Returns [code]true[/code] if the database was successfully closed.

method.name: create_collation
method.description: Creates a custom collation function named [param name] using [param callable] for string comparison logic.

method.name: create_function
method.description: Registers a custom SQL function named [param name] that accepts [param argc] arguments and executes [param callable].

method.name: create_query
method.description: Creates a prepared SQL query using [param statement] and optional [param arguments].

method.name: enable_load_extension
method.description: Enables or disables the ability to load SQLite extensions.

method.name: execute_script
method.description: Executes an SQL script located at [param path]. Returns [code]true[/code] if execution succeeds.

method.name: get_changes
method.description: Returns the number of rows affected by the most recent SQL statement.

method.name: get_database_filename
method.description: Returns the filename associated with the database identified by [param db_name].

method.name: get_db_config
method.description: Returns the current configuration value for the database option identified by [param op].

method.name: get_db_status
method.description: Returns the current database status counter for [param op]. If [param reset] is [code]true[/code], the counter is reset after reading.

method.name: get_global_status
method.description: Returns a global SQLite status counter identified by [param op]. If [param reset] is [code]true[/code], the counter is reset after reading.

method.name: get_last_error_code
method.description: Returns the last SQLite error code.

method.name: get_last_error_message
method.description: Returns the last SQLite error message.

method.name: get_last_insert_rowid
method.description: Returns the row ID of the last inserted row.

method.name: get_limit
method.description: Returns the SQLite limit value identified by [param id].

method.name: get_total_changes
method.description: Returns the total number of rows changed since the database was opened.

method.name: interrupt
method.description: Interrupts any currently running query.

method.name: is_autocommit
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the database is in autocommit mode.

method.name: is_readonly
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the database identified by [param db_name] is read-only.

method.name: open
method.description: Opens the database file at [param database]. Returns [code]true[/code] on success. If the path starts with [code]res://[/code], an in-memory or buffered version may be used automatically.

method.name: open_blob
method.description: Opens a BLOB handle for incremental access to binary data stored in a table.

method.name: open_buffered
method.description: Opens a database from an in-memory buffer. Changes are not persisted to disk.

method.name: open_in_memory
method.description: Opens a temporary in-memory database.

method.name: release_memory
method.description: Attempts to release up to [param bytes] of memory used by SQLite.

method.name: restore
method.description: Restores the database from the file at [param path].

method.name: restore_async
method.description: Restores the database asynchronously from [param path].

method.name: set_authorizer
method.description: Sets an authorizer callback used to approve or deny SQL operations.

method.name: set_busy_timeout
method.description: Sets the busy timeout in milliseconds.

method.name: set_db_config
method.description: Sets a database configuration option.

method.name: set_foreign_keys_enabled
method.description: Enables or disables foreign key enforcement.

method.name: set_limit
method.description: Sets a SQLite runtime limit.

method.name: set_progress_handler
method.description: Sets a progress handler invoked during long-running queries.

method.name: set_soft_heap_limit
method.description: Sets SQLite's soft heap memory limit.

method.name: set_trace
method.description: Enables or disables SQL tracing.

method.name: vacuum
method.description: Rebuilds and optimizes the database file.

method.name: wal_checkpoint
method.description: Performs a WAL checkpoint operation.

signal.name: query_profiled
signal.description: Emitted when a query is profiled with execution time information.

signal.name: query_progress
signal.description: Emitted periodically during long-running queries to report progress.

signal.name: row_updated
signal.description: Emitted when a row is inserted, updated, or deleted.

signal.name: transaction_committed
signal.description: Emitted when a transaction is committed.

signal.name: transaction_rolled_back
signal.description: Emitted when a transaction is rolled back.

signal.name: wal_updated
signal.description: Emitted when the WAL file is updated.
